title: Larva Pendant
tmdbOverview: This silly short-film sequel to "Larva Island" and "The Larva Island Movie" follows farting friends Red and Yellow's bumbling misadventures in the city.
synopsis: Larva Pendant (2022) is a comedy, family and animation film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on TMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a L certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
